scripts.prebuild: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/core build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/langgraph build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/langsmith build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai-compatible build
scripts.start:dev: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/core build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/langgraph build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/langsmith build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai-compatible build && tsx watch src/main.ts
scripts.pretest:e2e: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/core build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/langgraph build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/langsmith build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai-compatible build
scripts.pretypecheck: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/core build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/langgraph build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/langsmith build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/openai-compatible build
